body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45360", "cvss": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-502", "name": "Deserialization of Untrusted Data"}], "description": "Apache Airflow's scheduler-side deadline-reference decoder (`SerializedCustomReference.deserialize_reference`) imported and dispatched arbitrary class paths drawn from DAG-author-controlled serialized state without an allowlist or plugin-registry gate. A DAG author whose code reaches the scheduler — the default on single-host deployments where the DAG bundle is importable from the scheduler process — could embed a custom `DeadlineReference` whose serialized form named an attacker-controlled module path, causing the scheduler to `import_string(...)` and instantiate that class with a live SQLAlchemy session attached. Affects deployments where DAG-author code is less trusted than the scheduler process. Users are advised to upgrade to `apache-airflow` 3.2.2 or later.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00651, "percentile": 0.46522}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2r5m-76wx-56gx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-09T21:00:55Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2r5m-76wx-56gx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2r5m-76wx-56gx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45360"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-01T09:16:19Z", "published_at": "2026-06-01T09:31:14Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45360", "https://github.com/apache/airflow/pull/66737", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/q227dghjwgfz8xsxrf2pwpz4wk43zm83", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/31/12", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/apache-airflow/PYSEC-2026-186.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2r5m-76wx-56gx"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/airflow", "summary": "Apache Airflow Vulnerable to Deserialization of Untrusted Data", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-09T21:00:57Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2r5m-76wx-56gx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.2.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "apache-airflow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.2.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Airflow Vulnerable to Deserialization of Untrusted Data
